testcase.name: fblogin

failure.message: expected [Facebook] but found [Facebook – log in or sign up]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Facebook] but found [Facebook – log in or sign up] at screenshots.Testclass.fblogin(Testclass.java:35) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ... Removed 33 stack frames
